openFindings.title: Retired `applyLengthPenalty` flag still splits reranker cache keys
openFindings.description: `calculateLengthPenalty()` now always returns `1.0` and `applyLengthPenalty()` just clones the results array, but `rerankResults()` still bakes the flag into `optionBits`, so identical rerank requests can populate separate cache entries and skew later cache telemetry even though the output is identical. [SOURCE: `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/search/cross-encoder.ts:230`] [SOURCE: `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/search/cross-encoder.ts:432`] [SOURCE: `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/search/cross-encoder.ts:485`]
